name: kafka_demo_consumer_workflow
description: Started by the order_placed_handler event handler when an OrderPlaced event arrives. Echoes the inbound payload so the produce->consume loop is observable in the Orkes UI.

inputParameters.expression: function echo() { return { receivedAt: new Date().getTime(), eventId: $.eventId, orderId: $.orderId, userId: $.userId, amountCents: $.amountCents, currency: $.currency }; } echo();
